skill.name: skill-development
skill.description: Guides creation and improvement of Claude Code plugin skills with structured workflows, progressive disclosure, resource organization, and validation practices.
skill.summary: Create well-structured Claude Code plugin skills with clear triggers, lean instructions, and useful supporting resources.
skill.author: anthropics

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported many high and medium indicators, but review found they are Markdown examples, file tree diagrams, and skill-development instructions. No prompt injection, data exfiltration, hidden network access, or malicious execution intent was found in SKILL.md or references/skill-creator-original.md.

low_findings.title: Command Examples Are Documentation Only
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged command-like text and backticked paths as external command execution. Review shows the cited lines are fenced Markdown examples or inline documentation for creating and testing plugin skills, not executable code in this package. Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE. Confidence: 0.94. Confidence reasoning: The reviewed locations are Markdown instructions and examples, with no script file, subprocess API, shell wrapper, or automatic execution path present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed locations are Markdown instructions and examples, with no script file, subprocess API, shell wrapper, or automatic execution path present.

low_findings.title: Parent Directory References Are Benign Examples
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged ../ paths as path traversal. The reviewed lines reference sibling example skill directories for study and do not read, write, or copy files. Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE. Confidence: 0.92. Confidence reasoning: The paths appear only in a study list in SKILL.md and there is no code path that consumes them for filesystem access.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The paths appear only in a study list in SKILL.md and there is no code path that consumes them for filesystem access.

content.value_statement: Skill authors need clear structure, strong triggers, and reusable resources. This skill gives Claude and Codex a practical workflow for designing, writing, validating, and improving Claude Code plugin skills.
actual_capabilities: Explains the required SKILL.md structure and frontmatter fields.
Guides authors through use-case discovery and resource planning.
Shows when to use references, examples, scripts, and assets.
Defines writing style rules for clear skill instructions.
Provides validation checklists for triggers, resources, and organization.
Adapts general skill creation guidance to Claude Code plugin skills.
limitations: It is documentation only and does not include validation scripts.
It does not generate a complete skill without user-specific requirements.
It focuses on Claude Code plugin skills, not every marketplace format.
It cannot prove a new skill is safe without separate security review.

use_cases.title: Create a New Plugin Skill
use_cases.description: Plan trigger phrases, create the skill folder, and write a focused SKILL.md for a Claude Code plugin.

use_cases.title: Improve Existing Skill Documentation
use_cases.description: Review structure, reduce bloated instructions, and move detailed material into references or examples.

use_cases.title: Standardize Internal Skill Authoring
use_cases.description: Use shared rules for descriptions, progressive disclosure, validation, and resource organization.

prompt_templates.title: Plan a Simple Skill
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me plan a Claude Code plugin skill for [task]. Ask only the most important questions first, then suggest the SKILL.md structure.

prompt_templates.title: Draft Skill Instructions
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a first draft of a SKILL.md for [skill name]. Use third-person frontmatter, clear trigger phrases, and imperative body instructions.

prompt_templates.title: Organize Supporting Resources
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this skill idea and decide what belongs in SKILL.md, references, examples, scripts, or assets. Keep SKILL.md lean.

prompt_templates.title: Audit a Skill Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Evaluate this Claude Code plugin skill for trigger quality, progressive disclosure, resource references, writing style, and validation gaps.

output_examples.input: I need a skill for creating release notes from merged pull requests.
output_examples.output: A concise skill plan with trigger phrases, required resources, a SKILL.md outline, and validation checks for release-note quality.

output_examples.input: My skill file is too long and includes many examples.
output_examples.output: A restructuring recommendation that keeps core workflow in SKILL.md and moves detailed examples into reference files.

output_examples.input: Review this skill before I add it to a plugin.
output_examples.output: A checklist-based review covering description triggers, resource links, writing style, testing steps, and missing documentation.

best_practices: Start from concrete user examples before writing instructions.
Keep SKILL.md focused and move detailed material into referenced files.
Validate trigger phrases, resource links, examples, and writing style before publishing.
anti_patterns: Do not use vague descriptions that fail to match real user requests.
Do not place every detail in SKILL.md when references would be clearer.
Do not include scripts or examples that are incomplete, untested, or unreferenced.

faq.question: What does this skill help create?
faq.answer: It helps create and improve Claude Code plugin skills with clear triggers, focused instructions, and organized supporting resources.

faq.question: Does it create files automatically?
faq.answer: No. It provides guidance and examples. The agent using it may create files when the user asks.

faq.question: Why does it emphasize trigger phrases?
faq.answer: Trigger phrases decide when a skill loads. Specific phrases make the skill easier for Claude Code to select correctly.

faq.question: What is progressive disclosure?
faq.answer: Progressive disclosure keeps core guidance in SKILL.md and loads detailed references only when needed.

faq.question: Can this help with existing skills?
faq.answer: Yes. It can guide reviews, restructuring, resource planning, and clearer writing for existing plugin skills.

faq.question: Is this skill safe to publish?
faq.answer: The audit found low risk. The flagged command and path patterns are documentation examples, not executable code.
